details.note: Fixed dead JsonMigration import (removed from opencode module), added process error handlers, removed migration code path
Removed needsMigration and onSqliteProgress from type and message sent to sidecar
Removed needsMigration computation, sqlite listener, overlay logic that depended on removed migration
Added DuckDBConfig.defaultLayer to server layer chain to fix 'Service not found: @opencode/DuckDBConfig' error
Fixed Layer.provide build order issue: DuckDB.layer now wraps its own DuckDBConfig + DatabaseAdapter dependencies before being provided to the ToolRegistry chain
